message:
chore(beads): close br-9sztj / br-a6ouw + sync 1 additional close metadata line after spotify handshake fix

3-line beads metadata sync. Two of the updated records are the
paired spotify-handshake beads being closed by the preceding
commit:

- `flywheel_connectors-9sztj — [REVIEW][HIGH] fcp-e2e/spotify:
  handshake test masks connector handshake semantics` → closed,
  close_reason points at commit c9561961 (`fix(fcp-e2e/spotify):
  drive real HandshakeRequest through connector + assert
  response contract`).
- `flywheel_connectors-a6ouw — [REVIEW][HIGH] fcp-e2e/spotify:
  handshake test masks connector handshake semantics` → closed
  with the same close_reason. Two independent reviewers filed the
  same finding; both beads are preserved and both close at the
  same commit.

The third updated line is a routine metadata sync on a
previously-closed record; no existing issue bodies change. Line
count unchanged (3 lines modified, 0 insertions, 0 deletions).

With these two closes, the remaining open REVIEW beads from the
initial sweep are narrowed down to follow-up items that each
need their own implementation work: the webhook listing tests
already landed (br-u2g49 / br-wtp2t closed), terraform (br-619oy
closed), spotify (this commit), fcp-cbor canonicalize_map cap
(br-2h9au / br-w1098 closed), FROST nonce deserialize (br-5mhhv
/ br-5zmkr closed), fcp-host X-Principal (br-9ftlo closed),
fcp-mesh gossip cap (br-qc3d7 closed), fcp-store per-object
lock (br-tlspb closed).
